tog.name: Celaena Sardothien
tog.bio: A renowned assassin imprisoned in Endovier and chosen to compete for the position of King’s Champion.

tog.name: Chaol Westfall
tog.bio: Captain of the Guard and the officer responsible for escorting and training Celaena.

tog.name: Dorian Havilliard
tog.bio: Crown Prince of Adarlan and Celaena’s sponsor in the Champion competition.

tog.name: The King of Adarlan
tog.bio: The ruler of Adarlan and the person seeking a new Champion.

tog.name: Cain
tog.bio: A powerful competitor who quickly appears to be one of Celaena’s greatest physical threats.

tog.name: Princess Nehemia
tog.bio: A princess of Eyllwe visiting the Adarlanian court.

acotar1.name: Feyre Archeron
acotar1.bio: A human huntress supporting her family near the wall.

acotar1.name: Elain Archeron
acotar1.bio: Feyre’s sister, known for her gentler disposition.

acotar1.name: Tamlin
acotar1.bio: A powerful faerie lord associated with the Spring Court.

acotar1.name: Lucien
acotar1.bio: A sharp-tongued member of the Spring Court.

hoeab.name: Bryce Quinlan
hoeab.bio: A young woman living in Lunathion whose life is transformed by a devastating crime.

hoeab.name: Danika Fendyr
hoeab.bio: Bryce’s closest friend and leader of the Pack of Devils.

hoeab.name: Hunt Athalar
hoeab.bio: A powerful angel assigned to work with Bryce.
